task_objective: Restore the Ludusavi shortcut logo asset and apply it to plugin-managed shortcuts with the requested upper-left positioning.
tests_added: tests/test_shortcut_artwork_static.py logo asset, transparency, mapping, positioning, and Steam type assertions
design_decisions: Restored logo.png from existing git history instead of introducing a new external asset.
Applied logo artwork only in the existing plugin-managed shortcut artwork path.
Used SteamClient.Apps.SetCustomLogoPositionForApp when available, with appDetailsStore.SaveCustomLogoPosition as a compatibility fallback.
Kept runtime artwork fully local and did not modify upstream or vendored packages.
results: Focused artwork/package tests, frontend typecheck/verify/build, Python lint/type/full tests, and package creation passed. Frontend verification required network escalation for pnpm audit after sandbox DNS failed.
